title: EPC Contracting Company UAE
content:
Short for Engineering, Procurement, and Construction, we at Fabtech International take pride in being a well-recognized EPC contracting company in UAE. Backed by a competent and dedicated team, we have been operating in Power Plants, Oil & Gas, and Substations Fields in and around Dubai. Our team handles every aspect of the project, from design to procurement, construction to hiring, and transferring the project to the owner. With over 20+ years of experience in this field, we have developed strong relations with numerous supplies and established qualified individuals, each carrying extensive years of local and international knowledge. Having completed several projects, we aim to deliver cost-effective and technically feasible engineering solutions to Dubai and across UAE. To avail of our EPC contracting service, contact our team today!
We support our clients in sourcing ideal technologies to carry out a basic engineering process. The team will work closely with you to examine the most suitable option in the market and advise you on the market conditions.
Our experienced procurement and purchasing consultants have the required skills to carry out a project successfully. They are specialized in procuring materials within the client’s budget, control the quality of inspections, and ensures every detail is as per the schedule.
We created detail-oriented plans and constructible scenarios, select appropriate subcontractors, and begin conducting practical measures such as hiring new staff for the project. As a specialized EPC solution provider, we work together and strive to achieve optimal results.
We provide a comprehensive range of operations and maintenance services across several sectors in Dubai. Our services can be provided on a standalone basis as well as being completely integrated with the latest technology.
As one of the forefront EPC companies in UAE, we execute a wide range of EPC services in the refinery sector. Together with our experienced workforce, we undertake several sets of large-scale refinery EPC projects.
In addition to refining, we have the expertise to execute projects for clients in the petrochemical sector. Our team optimizes the design, procurement, and construction process reliably and efficiently.
We eliminate the risk involved in carrying out challenging tasks such as transferring crude oil and gas to the refinery and back to the market, therefore allowing the owner to focus on the core aspects of their business.
Our solutions not only help identify changes in procurement patterns but also the utilization trends. Our team will interpret the raw data and provide you with essential and actionable insight into fabrication, pricing, supply chains, and logistics.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
